items.name: Claude Opus Latest
items.description: This model always redirects to the latest model in the Claude Opus family.
items.description_zh: 该型号始终重定向至 Claude Opus 系列中的最新型号。

items.name: Pareto Code Router
items.description: The Pareto Router maintains a tiered shortlist of strong coding models, ranked by Artificial Analysis coding percentiles. Set min coding score between 0 and 1 on the pareto-router plugin to control how...

items.name: Kimi K2.6
items.description: Kimi K2.6 is Moonshot AI's next-generation multimodal model, designed for long-horizon coding, coding-driven UI/UX generation, and multi-agent orchestration. It handles complex end-to-end coding tasks across Python, Rust, and Go, and...
items.description_zh: Kimi K2.6 是 Moonshot AI 的下一代多模式模型，专为长视野编码、编码驱动的 UI/UX 生成和多代理编排而设计。它可以跨 Python、Rust 和 Go 处理复杂的端到端编码任务，并且...
